subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Be thou neither sorrowful nor grieved in heart. Thou hast been, and shalt ever remain, the object of loving grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق محزون مباش دلخون مباش منظور نظر عنایت بوده و هستید اگر در
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
